title: Software Engineer
highlights: Engineered and maintained the Developer Experience Demo project, showcasing TomTom’s navigation capabilities in demo vehicles for global events, including CES 2025.

Built a dynamic web interface with Node.js and Flask to control live demo flows, integrated Map-Maker for real-time map style customization, and connected the in-house navigation app with vehicle systems for interactive presentations.
Worked closely with design, marketing, engineering, and stakeholders to align the technical setup with the story TomTom wanted to tell during live showcases.

title: Software Engineer Intern
highlights: Built and scaled an AI-powered Slack bot that automated internal feedback triage across multiple Slack channels. The bot categorized input from 2,000+ users, generated structured Jira tickets, and reduced manual triage work by 80%.
Also contributed to AmiGO, TomTom’s navigation mobile app, by implementing features and fixing bugs in React Native with Redux-Saga.

title: Quality Assurance Officer
highlights: Submitted daily reports, addressed safety deviations, and led corrective actions across production lines.
Developed an Excel automation tool using VBA that reduced data entry time by 70%.
